HeroSection.title: Build Something Amazing
HeroSection.subtitle: A high-performance, i18n-ready boilerplate to launch stunning websites in record time.

FeaturesSection.title: Why Choose This Stack
FeaturesSection.subtitle: Everything you need to deliver blazing-fast websites that convert visitors into customers.
FeaturesSection.feature1Description: Built on Next.js with SSG for PageSpeed 99+ scores out of the box. Your clients will love the speed.
FeaturesSection.feature2Description: Pre-rendered pages, semantic HTML, and optimized meta tags ensure top search engine rankings.
FeaturesSection.feature3Description: Full i18n support with next-intl. Add new languages by simply creating a JSON file.

CTASection.title: Ready to get started?
CTASection.description: Clone this boilerplate and have your next client site live in under 24 hours.

Footer.description: A high-performance boilerplate for building fast, beautiful, and multilingual websites.
